race.comment: BEND IT LIKE BECKS (2) has started his career in good order, missing by 1.7L last start when finishing well over 1400m. Out to 1650m today is a big tick and Nottle's claim comes in handy. Building nicely and he looks well placed to strike third-up into the campaign. CANNOTSTOP (1) missed in a photo two back before a 2.9L defeat when getting well back at 1400m. The draw is a query, but he's racing in good order and his figures suggest he's on the cusp of a win. Can get the job done this time. ENCHANTED MISS (10) was strong fresh before getting too far back and not featuring over 1200m. Third-up now and out to 1650m is a good move judging by her latest effort. Watch for her late in the race. SAVIENNE (11) creates interest being first-up here over 1650m. Not to be discounted. STAR ASSAULT (9) has to be included following a good run at Pinjarra last time out.
